name: Remitly Global, Inc.
business: Remitly is a trusted provider of cross-border financial services, primarily digital money movement, serving consumers and businesses in over 175 countries through a platform that enables sending money across borders.

exposures.sentence: Leveraging our strengths in global money movement, we continue to evolve beyond a remittance company into a diversified, cross-border financial services provider, serving both consumers and businesses across a growing set of use cases.
We embed AI across customer-facing experiences and internal workflows to improve speed, accuracy, and cost efficiency.

Cyberattacks, cybersecurity breaches, service outages, or other similar incidents could result in serious harm to our business, financial condition, operating results, reputation, and future prospects.

catalysts.sentence: In July 2025, our board of directors approved a share repurchase program that provides for the repurchase of up to an aggregate of $200 million of our outstanding common stock.

The 2021 Revolving Credit Facility was amended in December 2023 ... and was replaced in June 2025 with the 2025 Revolving Credit Facility, which increased the revolving commitments to $550.0 million (including a $200.0 million letter of credit sub-facility).

catalysts.event: Self-certified participation in EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework
catalysts.sentence: in late 2025, we self-certified our participation in the EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework (and the U.K. Extension).

tamClaims.claim: Consumers and small to mid-sized businesses move more than $22 trillion across borders annually, expected to reach more than $34 trillion by 2032.
tamClaims.sentence: Based on recent estimates from FXC Intelligence, a financial data company, consumers and small to mid-sized businesses move more than $22 trillion across borders annually, a figure expected to reach more than $34 trillion by 2032.
